source_pr.title: server: Refactor server tests
source_pr.body:
Main Change:

Change connection string from `DSN string` to `structure -> DSN string` so that every test case can modify only some parts of the connection string while keeping changes in other parts. This simplify the testing for different connection methods, for example, UNIX socket or [TLS](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/3716) in the future.

To support assembling the DSN from structure, go-sql-driver is updated to take advantage of its `Config` feature.

evidence: files: _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/buffer.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/collations.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/connection.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/connection_go18.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/const.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/driver.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/dsn.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/errors.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/infile.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/packets.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/rows.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/statement.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/transaction.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/utils.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/utils_go17.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/utils_go18.go, _vendor/src/github.com/go-sql-driver/mysql/utils_legacy.go, glide.lock, glide.yaml, server/conn.go, server/region_handler_test.go, server/server_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, session.go
